sentence: Merge sort is useful for linked lists.

sentence: Quick sort partitions around a pivot.

sentence: Stable multi key sorting can be done from least important key upward.

sentence: Topological sorting is ordering not comparison sorting.

sentence: Sorting changes input order unless a copy is used.

sentence: External sorting handles data too large for memory.

sentence: Sorting complexity may dominate an algorithm.

sentence: Partial sorting can be cheaper when only top elements matter.

sentence: Hash tables use computed positions for expected fast access.

sentence: Collisions occur when distinct keys map to the same bucket.

sentence: Load factor measures table fullness.

sentence: Hash sets store membership without preserving order.

sentence: Hash maps associate keys with values.

sentence: Immutable keys are safer for hash tables.

sentence: Prefix hashes can compare substrings efficiently.

sentence: Frequency maps convert repeated counting into constant expected updates.

sentence: Hashing trades memory for faster lookup.

sentence: Sets can detect duplicates during a single scan.

sentence: Hash tables are excellent for exact lookup.

sentence: Union find maintains disjoint groups under merge operations.

sentence: Path compression flattens trees during find.

sentence: Union by rank avoids attaching tall trees under short ones.

sentence: Union by size attaches smaller sets under larger sets.

sentence: Find returns the representative of an element set.

sentence: Union find is efficient for dynamic connectivity with only additions.

sentence: The amortized cost of union find is nearly constant.

sentence: A union operation should merge representatives not raw nodes.

sentence: Connected components can be tracked with union find.

sentence: Cycle detection in undirected graphs can use union find.

sentence: Union find does not preserve the actual path between nodes.

sentence: Path compression can be recursive or iterative.

sentence: Rank is an upper bound on tree height.

sentence: Union find works on identifiers after mapping them to indices.

sentence: Initial union find starts with every element alone.

sentence: Correctness relies on representatives uniquely identifying components.

sentence: Arrays provide constant time access by index.

sentence: Stacks follow last in first out order.
